name: tentaflow-mobile-wrapper
description: Capacitor wrapper dla TentaFlow PWA — buduje natywny Android APK + iOS IPA z wwwroot tentaflow-core.

scripts.android:open: npm run sync && cap open android
scripts.android:build: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.ios:open: npm run sync && cap open ios
scripts.ios:build: npm run sync && cd ios/App && pod install && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release
